title: 'Nobody would've believed it if there wasn't a video': Remembering Randy Johnson's bird pitch
content: In 2001, one of baseball's first viral moments played out on a spring training field. Those who were there relive the "Sea of Feathers" game.

title: Tiger surprised over DUI arrest, bodycam shows
content: Tiger Woods expressed astonishment as he was handcuffed after crashing his vehicle last week in Florida, according to body camera footage released Thursday.

title: Bauer returns to U.S. with minor league Ducks
content: Former Cy Young winner Trevor Bauer has signed with the Long Island Ducks of the Atlantic League and is scheduled to pitch opening night April 21 for the minor league team.

title: Demary 90% as UConn seeks 'rings, not watches'
content: Silas Demary Jr., who has been hobbled with a high ankle sprain during the NCAA tournament, is expected to be at 90% for UConn's Final Four matchup vs. Illinois.

title: Cignetti backs Hoover after turnover dig by Dykes
content: Indiana coach Curt Cignetti reiterated his support for transfer quarterback Josh Hoover while responding to recent comments from TCU coach Sonny Dykes about Hoover's high turnovers total.

title: Just foolin': Wizards sorry about $10K shot 'skit'
content: The Wizards have apologized for an April Fools' "skit" in which a planted fan was seemingly tricked into believing he made a half-court shot for $10,000, saying the entire bit was scripted but that they "missed the mark."

title: Arrr you ready? Pirates call up teen phenom Griffin
content: The Pirates are calling up 19-year-old shortstop Konnor Griffin, the No. 1 prospect in baseball, ahead of Friday's home opener against the Orioles.

title: Files: NCSU trainer's contact 'unwelcome,' 'sexual'
content: A Title IX investigation found a former NC State trainer's conduct was "unwelcome and of a sexual nature" while treating a male athlete, according to documents obtained by ESPN.

title: Michigan's 'Fab Five' part of Final 4 alt-broadcast
content: Michigan's "Fab Five" -- Chris Webber, Jalen Rose, Juwan Howard, Jimmy King and Ray Jackson -- will reunite as part of an alternate broadcast during Saturday's Final Four.

title: 🥰 Allen, Steinfeld announce birth of first child
content: The Buffalo Bills quarterback and the "Sinners" actress did not share the date of birth or the name of their daughter.

title: Three-round NFL mock draft: Kiper, Miller, Reid and Yates rotate through the top 100 picks
content: We asked four draft analysts -- Mel Kiper Jr., Matt Miller, Jordan Reid and Field Yates -- to make picks in the first three rounds. Where do the top prospects land?

title: These flaws could hold back the draft's top QBs
content: We saw a lot during the college careers of the draft's top QBs. Each has something that could set them back.

title: The latest on Kawhi Leonard, Steve Ballmer and the NBA's investigation into the LA Clippers
content: What was actually in Leonard's contract? What do league insiders think of it? Here's what we know about the allegations -- and where the investigation stands.

title: MLB Power Rankings: Who are the top teams one week into the season?
content: With baseball now underway, how much has changed since our preseason rankings? Our Week 1 rankings tell the story.

title: Ranking the top 55 WNBA free agents, from MVPs to key rotation players
content: More than 100 players are WNBA free agents. We break down what factors are at play in the decision-making process.

title: Your men's Final Four guide: Illinois-UConn, Arizona-Michigan (with predictions!)
content: We run through every team's keys to advancing to the championship game -- and their potential fatal flaws.

title: Chasing history, Arizona is staying present in run to Final Four
content: The Wildcats are back in the national semifinals for the first time in 25 years -- but are focused on the moment.

title: Who will go No. 1 in June's NBA draft? Where could Boozer land? We asked execs
content: Fit over talent? Versatility over production? NBA scouts and execs break down the conversations happening at the top of the draft.

title: No seats, no silence: A night inside the Clippers' Wall
content: Built to disrupt, the Intuit Dome's most intense section affects games in real time by turning fans into participants -- and opponents into targets.

title: How Brandon Bussi's brother, Dylan, continues to inspire his NHL journey
content: The 27-year-old goalie has had a record-breaking debut season for the Hurricanes, and his brother remains in his mindset.

title: NHL playoff watch: Clinching day for the Sabres, Hurricanes, Wild?
content: Buffalo, Carolina and Minnesota can punch playoff tickets on Thursday. Here's what to watch in a 14-game slate.

title: NBA playoff watch: MVP showdown in OKC?
content: Luka and SGA go head-to-head. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Wednesday.

title: USMNT big board: Did March losses finalize Pochettino's squad?
content: The March international window was the last time for players to impress U.S. coach Mauricio Pochettino, so who cemented their place on his team?

title: Kit ranking: Assessing every jersey we'll see this summer
content: The World Cup will be the first with 48 teams, which means 96 kits! Here is every one, from worst to first.

title: Who are the best 21 women's players aged 21 or under in the world?
content: Welcome to the next generation of women's stars aged 21 or under, with representatives from the NWSL, WSL and across Europe.

title: Inside the friction between Jalen Hurts and the Eagles
content: ESPN pulls back the curtain on what's ailing a star-studded Eagles offense, one in which its QB must evolve.

title: Tournament picks: How to bet Saturday's national semifinal games
content: Will the Illini get revenge for the loss to UConn back in November? Is the total too high in the late game?

title: Alvarez a top-10 bat? Ohtani wins Cy Young? Perdomo for real? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: The new aces? Five pitchers poised for a breakout season
content: Tristan H. Cockcroft takes a look at five pitchers who are likely to be on many a fantasy championship roster.

title: Why new rules have Max Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Madrid eye young Leverkusen striker
content: Arsenal and Real Madrid are keen on Bayer Leverkusen striker Christian Kofane. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: 'Make a deal before it’s too late': Trump warns Iran, shares video of Karaj bridge 'tumbling down'
content: In a bold address, former President Trump cautioned Iran, calling for immediate negotiations following US airstrikes that struck a significant bridge just outside of Tehran and a prominent medical institution. Posting a video showcasing the damage to the Karaj bridge, Trump pledged to intensify measures. This development heightens regional instability, hinting at a more aggressive approach from the United States.

title: The politics of giving: How Tamil Nadu set the template for India's freebies race
content: Indian politics is witnessing an era of pre-poll freebies, with parties offering cash doles and concessions to woo voters. Tamil Nadu has a long history of welfare politics, evolving from subsidized food and education to direct cash transfers and consumer goods, now focusing on universal benefits and fiscal sustainability.

title: IPL: Klaasen leads the charge with bat as SRH crush KKR by 65 runs
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad beat Kolkata Knight Riders by 65 runs, powered by Heinrich Klaasen’s steady 52 and strong support from Nitish Kumar Reddy. After a rapid start from Head and Abhishek, SRH post 226/8. KKR begin well but collapse due to poor coordination and wickets, getting bowled out for 161 despite Raghuvanshi’s 52 and Rinku’s effort.

title: From TMC to BJP, Congress to CPM: Dynasts take centre stage in West Bengal elections 2026
content: West Bengal's political landscape is witnessing a significant rise in dynastic representation for the 2026 assembly elections. Across major parties like TMC, BJP, Congress, and CPI(M), candidates from established political families are increasingly being fielded. This marks a departure from Bengal's traditional grassroots politics, as parties now prioritize candidates with existing voter recognition and organizational support.

title: JP Morgan CEO on work from home, sends message to top execs who support remote work
content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon declared that companies prioritizing remote work will falter, asserting his firm would outperform rivals.  While acknowledging remote work's utility for specific roles and caregivers, Dimon emphasized its limitations for collaboration and development, particularly for junior staff. This stance contrasts with employee preferences for hybrid or fully remote arrangements.

title: Sachs warns of escalation, oil disruption in Iran conflict; calls for global action
content: As the conflict stretches into its second month, leading economist Jeffrey Sachs expresses grave concerns regarding the intensifying war and global instability. He denounces US President Trump and Israeli PM Netanyahu for defying expert counsel in initiating the conflict, a choice that could lead to dramatic hikes in oil prices and prompt Iran to reassess its nuclear program.

title: West Bengal poll chaos: Villagers hold SIR officers 'hostage', EC asks NIA to probe case
content: The Election Commission has handed over the investigation into the gherao of judicial officers in Malda, West Bengal, to the National Investigation Agency. This move follows strong criticism from the Supreme Court regarding the state's "complete failure" to protect officers during electoral roll revision. An NIA team is set to begin its probe soon.

title: Oracle layoffs: 6 AM email that laid off 10,000+ employees did not come from HR
content: Oracle has begun its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally without prior notice. Employees received termination emails early Tuesday, with immediate system access revocation.  The company's aggressive AI data center expansion is cited as a key driver for these cuts, which could affect up to 30,000 staff. Severance packages require signing documents first.

title: $20 million Everest rescue scam clouds Nepal’s climbing season
content: Trekkers given food that induced nausea, weakened them so they couldn't continue on foot & needed emergency flights

title: ‘It’s never an individual’s fault’: Anthropic’s Boris Cherny breaks silence on Claude Code leak debate
content: A manual deployment error by Anthropic accidentally exposed the source code of its popular AI coding tool, Claude Code, to the public. The leak revealed internal project codenames and a proactive background agent named KAIROS. Anthropic clarified it was a packaging issue, not a security breach, and is enhancing automation to prevent future incidents. No employees were fired.

title: NHL Standings: Buffalo Sabres on verge of ending NHL-record playoff drought with win over Ottawa Senators
content: The Buffalo Sabres are on the cusp of ending the NHL's longest playoff drought, a 14-year streak, with a win against the Ottawa Senators. This historic achievement follows a remarkable second-half surge, transforming their season from last place in December to a strong playoff contender. A victory on Thursday will secure their postseason berth, marking their first appearance since 2011.

title: Nato's razor edge: What happens if Trump walks away?
content: President Trump is again threatening to withdraw the US from Nato, citing allies' financial contributions and their refusal to join efforts to secure the Strait of Hormuz.  Despite US military dominance, European nations are increasing defense spending, partly as a hedge against potential US withdrawal.  This move could destabilize global security.

title: Martina Navratilova warns Emma Raducanu after Miami Open withdrawal
content: Emma Raducanu’s coaching changes are back in focus after Martina Navratilova urged her to stay with one coach longer. Raducanu, however, prefers flexibility and wants to rediscover her natural game. With mixed results, recent injuries, and no full-time coach, she stands at a key moment. Her next decision could define how her career moves forward.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry team up with $150bn mogul
content: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.

title: Stephen Curry opens up on struggles as Ayesha Curry faces criticism
content: ​Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, is considered one of the most popular athletes in the world because of his talent. While Stephen Curry’s achievements have inspired billions of fans around the world, the Golden State Warriors’ star player remains committed to his career. Amid this, Stephen Curry opens up about what kept him going throughout the years through all the failures.

title: KKR vs SRH: Run-out chaos! Cameron Green falls prey to bizarre mix-up - Watch
content: Cameron Green's IPL 2026 campaign hit a new low with a peculiar run-out against Sunrisers Hyderabad. After SRH posted a formidable 226, KKR's chase began explosively. However, a miscommunication in the Powerplay saw Green dismissed for a mere 2, adding to KKR's early struggles and highlighting a costly hesitation.

title: Sonali Bendre, Goldie Behl accused of land grab; actress calls it false
content: A farmer from Pune district has filed a civil lawsuit against actor Sonali Bendre and her filmmaker husband Goldie Behl, accusing them of land encroachment and “mafia-style” intimidation. The actor, however, has denied the allegations, calling the case a false attempt to extort money.

title: Sarpanch pati to menstrual hygiene: Raghav Chadha’s push in Parliament and on Insta
content: The Aam Aadmi Party has replaced Raghav Chadha as its Rajya Sabha deputy leader with Ashok Mittal, signaling a strategic shift in parliamentary roles. Chadha, previously a prominent voice, will no longer be part of the party's official speaking lineup, despite his recent engagement on public interest issues and a growing social media presence.

title: Balochistan, Afghanistan, Iran: Is Pakistan running out of strategic room?
content: Pakistan faces a strategic crossroads, caught between alliances and regional conflicts.  Past involvements in foreign wars, driven by external powers, have led to domestic instability and blowback.  Now, a new defence pact with Saudi Arabia and escalating conflict with Afghanistan highlight the nation's struggle to balance relevance with long-term stability, risking further entanglement.

title: ‘Not everything you see is true’: LSG release full video after Goenka-Pant clip goes viral
content: Lucknow Super Giants have clarified the on-field interaction between owner Sanjiv Goenka and captain Rishabh Pant after their recent defeat. The franchise released a video to counter speculation, emphasizing that "not everything you see is the true story." This follows a similar public exchange between Goenka and then-captain KL Rahul last season.

title: Pepe Marti turns ‘professor Pepe’ to explain Pit Boost to his Formula E fans: Watch
content: Cupra Kiro driver Pepe Marti is back with yet another interesting video on social media. The 20-year-old Formula E rookie has shared an explainer video to educate his fans about the Pit Boost concept in Formula E, one of the standout features of the electric racing series. He is currently 12th in Formula E Drivers' Standings.

title: Nuclear icebreakers & submarines: How Russia, China aim to shatter US hold on global trade
content: The Arctic is emerging as a critical new maritime highway, driven by Russia and China's strategic investments in infrastructure and icebreaker fleets. This development offers shorter trade routes between Asia and Europe, challenging traditional chokepoints and reshaping global power dynamics as the US plays catch-up.

title: India attends UK-led talks on Strait of Hormuz opening; MEA says 'in touch with Iran'
content: India is set to join the UK-led discussions focusing on reopening the vital Strait of Hormuz, as confirmed by the Ministry of External Affairs. The Foreign Secretary is expected to represent India at this pivotal meeting.

title: Mustafizur row: IPL chief Dhumal breaks silence - 'Govt is supportive of ...'
content: IPL chairman Arun Singh Dhumal called Mustafizur Rahman’s release from Kolkata Knight Riders “unfortunate” after BCCI instructed the move, sparking controversy. The issue had wider fallout, with Bangladesh later replaced by Scotland in the 2026 T20 World Cup. Dhumal said the government has no role in daily cricket matters, while KKR confirmed they followed BCCI directives.

title: Are you a ‘worker’ under India’s labour codes? How it differs from white‑collar employment
content: Overall, the labour codes aim to balance protection, flexibility and clarity—supporting both employee welfare and organisational efficiency in a unified legal framework.

title: 'When you were in caves ...': Iran taunts US over 'Stone Age' threat
content: Iran has sharply retorted to US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's "stone age" threats, highlighting Iran's ancient civilization and resilience. The Iranian embassy in South Africa countered that while Americans were "still in caves," Iran was inscribing human rights.

title: 'This isn't a show!' Macron ridicules Trump after US prez mocks his marriage
content: French President Macron has sharply criticised Donald Trump's remarks about his marriage, deeming them "neither elegant nor up to standard." Trump's comments, made during a speech and a video, also targeted Nato allies. French political figures across the spectrum have condemned Trump's personal attacks, emphasizing the gravity of global issues.

title: 'Trump controls PM': Rahul Gandhi attacks Modi in Assam, calls Himanta 'most corrupt CM'
content: Rahul Gandhi launched a scathing attack on PM Modi and Assam CM Sarma, alleging foreign influence and corruption ahead of the 2026 elections. Gandhi claimed Trump controls Modi and accused Sarma of running a "land ATM" with Modi and Shah. Congress also unveiled poll promises including financial aid for women and land rights.

title: 'Contradicting himself every day': Macron mocks Trump, rejects US military plan for Hormuz
content: French president Macron criticized Donald Trump's inconsistent Iran policy, deeming military action to reopen the Strait of Hormuz unrealistic. Macron emphasized the need for de-escalation and renewed negotiations. Trump's shifting stances on allies, escalation, and war objectives have drawn international and domestic criticism, with many nations hesitant to join US efforts.

title: Ranjith Balakrishnan arrest: WCC questions Kerala safety over assault allegations
content: Malayalam filmmaker Ranjith Balakrishnan faces arrest following a sexual assault complaint by an actress. Allegedly, he entered her caravan without consent on a film set.  The Women in Cinema Collective has voiced strong criticism, questioning systemic failures in protecting women. Ranjith denies the charges, asserting his innocence and preparing a bail plea.

title: 'For the IPL to move from 74 to 94 matches, we need a bigger window': IPL chairman Arun Dhumal
content: IPL Chairman Arun Singh Dhumal revealed expansion plans for the tournament, aiming for 84 or 94 matches. However, a significant hurdle is the crowded international cricket calendar. Dhumal suggested a potential shift away from bilateral series could create the necessary space for the IPL's growth beyond its current 74-game format.

title: 'For a very important bill': Parliament to reconvene on April 16; what’s on cards
content: Parliament is set to reconvene on April 16 to consider legislation that could increase Lok Sabha seats from 543 to 816, with 273 seats reserved for women. This move aims to implement a one-third reservation for women in the Lok Sabha and state assemblies, significantly altering the country's political landscape and reinforcing the government's women's empowerment agenda.

title: Raghav Chadha sidelined? AAP's Rajya Sabha shuffle triggers rumours; what went wrong
content: Raghav Chadha has been removed as the Aam Aadmi Party's deputy leader in the Rajya Sabha. Ashok Mittal has been appointed in his place. The party has also requested the Rajya Sabha secretariat not to allot speaking time to Chadha from its quota. This move comes amid reports of indiscipline and not adhering to the party line.

title: Trolled for documentary after 6 off Bumrah, Pakistan batter breaks Virat Kohli record
content: Sahibzada Farhan smashed an unbeaten 106 to guide Multan Sultans to a thrilling six-wicket victory over Hyderabad Kingsmen in the PSL. Chasing 226, Farhan's sensational century, supported by Steven Smith's quickfire 46, secured the fifth-highest successful chase in PSL history. This remarkable innings marked Farhan's ninth T20 century, placing him joint-fourth on the all-time list.

title: Delhi HC reserve verdict in Rajpal Yadav's debt case, actor makes emotional plea
content: Actor Rajpal Yadav's legal battle over a Rs 9 crore cheque bounce case saw the Delhi High Court reserve its verdict after settlement talks failed. Despite judicial intervention and an emotional plea from Yadav, who cited financial hardship, no agreement was reached.

title: 'Boring singer': Why Trump is gunning for 'The Boss'
content: President Donald Trump publicly criticized Bruce Springsteen on social media, accusing the musician of "Trump Derangement Syndrome" and calling him a "boring singer." Trump urged his MAGA supporters to boycott Springsteen's concerts, citing the singer's long-standing vocal opposition to his presidency and policies. This latest exchange continues a feud that began in 2016.

title: Madras High Court dismisses case filed by Sasikala’s alleged benamidar in ₹1,911 crore demonetised currency case
content: She had allegedly used the currency to purchase shopping malls and mills across Tamil Nadu when Jayalalithaa had been hospitalised in 2016

title: T.N. Assembly election: Stalin challenges Prime Minister Modi to repeat Bihar poll jibe during T.N. campaign
content: Asserting that Tamil Nadu has been a haven of peace for people of diverse cultures, the Chief Minister hits out at Mr. Modi for alleging ill-treatment of workers from Bihar in Tamil Nadu. He also criticises the Central government for its denial of Metro Rail projects for Coimbatore and Madurai

title: T.N. Assembly election: Boycott NDA to protect Tamil Nadu’s rights, says Stalin
content: Accusing Edappadi K. Palaniswami of becoming a branch secretary of the BJP, he asserts that the NDA has to be uprooted completely to prevent Tamil Nadu from becoming a land of violence

title: Sholinghur: Residents seek better roads, want govt. to set up godowns to store sugarcane crop
content: Devotees visiting the Sri Lakshminarasimhar temple seek better facilities to reach the hill shrine and affordable govt. accommodation for devotees

title: War in West Asia dampens tourism in Kerala
content: Kerala’s beaches usually teem with foreign tourists by March-April, the fag end of tourism season. But the sector is witnessing mass cancellations due to the conflict in West Asia, which mostly provides transit for Kerala-bound international tourists. Stakeholders say that the tourism industry is facing a double whammy with the war-triggered LPG shortage

title: Power, petroleum and policy in focus at Future Career Conversations
content: With India importing nearly 85% of its oil, panellists noted that vulnerabilities have only intensified since the Ukraine war, which disrupted established supply chains and altered global energy flows

title: T.N. legislature fully empowered to take away power to appoint Vice-Chancellors from Governor: State tells Madras High Court
content: Makes the submission in a counter affidavit filed in response to a writ petition challenging nine amendment Acts passed in 2025

title: Governor bound by Cabinet’s advice: Madras High Court
content: Justices A.D. Jagadish Chandira, G.K. Ilanthiraiyan and Sunder Mohan answer a reference made to them by a Division Bench of the High Court

title: Assembly Election highlights: ECI appoints Sandeep Rai Rathore to head Tamil Nadu police
content: The ECI also appointed Additional Director General of Police Sanjay Kumar, a 1997-batch IPS officer, as the Commissioner of Police, Tambaram and Abhishek Dixit as the Commissioner of Police, Madurai

title: Rahul Gandhi urges Modi to withdraw cases against Dalit, Adivasi youth booked after 2018 protests
content: The Opposition leader says the protests were triggered by a judicial pronouncement that diluted provisions of the law meant to protect Dalits and Adivasis from discrimination and violence

title: Competence, not just seniority will define future leadership: Cabinet Secretary
content: During ‘Karmayogi Sadhana Saptah’, a national learning initiative, aimed at strengthening the capabilities of public servants, he remarks that while ‘seniority may act like a force that moves careers upward, it is capability that determines how far one truly rises’

title: 12 years after the split of Andhra Pradesh, Parliament clears Bill to make Amaravati its capital
content: YSRCP was the only political party to oppose the Bill, citing farmers’ demands; TDP says this is a historic day for the ‘entire Telugu community’; Opposition slams 12-year delay as a ‘national shame’

title: NIA charges two including Pakistani gangster in grenade attack case
content: The grenade attack on YouTuber Roger Sandhu’s house in Jalandhar was carried out in the early hours of March 16, 2025

title: Supreme Court asks Centre if boarded-out cadets qualify as ex-military personnel for quota benefits
content: A Bench headed by Justice B.V. Nagarathna pointed out that a majority of the boarded-out candidates were below the age of 30, and would need employment

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Claims, counter-claims of development rule election campaign in Muvattupuzha
content: LDF’s N. Arun and NDA’s Sunny Kaduthazhe aim to wrest the seat from UDF’s Mathew Kuzhalnadan, who is seeking a re-election in the Muvattupuzha Assembly constituency

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Anti-incumbency against LDF government most decisive factor in polls, says Karassery
content: Social critic and author M.N. Karassery is of the view that the electorate in Kerala has many reasons to vote against the Left Democratic Front (LDF) government. In an interview with The Hindu, he also claims that the Congress should be brought back to power to keep the BJP out

title: Foreign Secretary participates in U.K. meet on opening Hormuz
content: Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri, joining the deliberations through virtual mode, articulated India's stance on safety of international shipping lanes in the region

title: Defence exports hit a record ₹38,424 crore in FY26, surge 63% year-on-year
content: The milestone reflects strong contributions from both public and private players, with DPSUs accounting for 54.84% of the exports and the private sector contributing 45.16%, according to the MoD

title: From files to algorithms, experts discuss digital governance at summit
content: Session brings together voices from governance, law and technology to unpack a rapidly shifting landscape where Artificial Intelligence is changing equations

title: GE Aerospace delivers sixth engine for Tejas
content: There has been a delay in the delivery schedule of engines for the LCA Mk-1A variant, which was criticised by Chief of Air Staff Air Chief Marshal A.P. Singh during the last edition of the Aero India in Bengaluru

title: India should lead Global South to de-escalate West Asia crisis, says Anand Sharma
content: “Indian diplomatic handling of the crisis has been mature and skilful, avoiding potential minefields,”  says the Congress leader

title: ‘Miyas’ will be game-changers in Assam election, says AIMIM president Asaduddin Owaisi
content: The AIMIM chief says backing the AIUDF is crucial for safeguarding the constitutional rights of communities affected by the ‘politics of hatred’s

title: Congress promise ST status for six Assam communities
content: Adding to its five guarantees announced earlier, the party vows to form an Anti-Corruption Commission and Urban Flood Mitigation Plan, among a slew of commitments

title: Delhi pays tribute to K.P. Unnikrishnan
content: Friends, family and colleagues recall the former Union Minister as a principled socialist, a lifelong scholar and a politician admired across party lines

title: On the campaign trail with K.C. Venugopal
content: From his base in Kerala, K.C. Venugopal directs Parliament strategy in Delhi, connects local fishermen’s concerns to developments in the Strait of Hormuz, and urges voters to unseat Pinarayi Vijayan and choose the Congress as the “real Left” in the State

title: Indian Oil scales up auto LPG supplies amid surge in demand
content: The average daily sales at IndianOil’s ALDS in Karnataka have risen sharply to 59.53 metric tonnes (MT), compared to the previous three-month average of 43.4 MT

title: Doorstep services, 48-hour verification: GBA’s GSKs aim to transform civic services access
content: When requested, trained personnel called ‘Seva Mitras’ will visit residences to assist with applications, verification, and documentation

title: Auto LPG shortage further hits Bengaluru autorickshaw services
content: The shortage, due to the ongoing conflict in West Asia that disrupted fuel logistics, has severely impacted thousands of autorickshaw drivers who depend on LPG

title: T.N. Assembly election: Udhayanidhi files nomination
content: The deputy chief minister has declared movable assets to the tune of ₹12.92 crore and immovable assets of ₹7.72 crore

title: CAPF Bill passed by Lok Sabha as Opposition walks out over absence of Home Minister
content: Rahul Gandhi takes to X to say that he had sent a word to the government to postpone it to another day as he was away for electioneering in Assam but it was not done; Congress, SP and Trinamool demanded it be sent to a select committee

title: AI-based monitoring system to boost safety and quality in government-run dialysis units under PPP
content: The system enables real-time tracking of critical dialysis parameters, allowing healthcare teams to closely monitor patients during treatment and respond quickly to any variations

title: Himanta Sarma Slams 'Gen-Z' Candidate Kunki Chowdhury's Party Over Mother's Insta Post
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma claimed that she had posted photos of consuming beef on Instagram and made a remark that, according to him, challenged Sanatan Dharma.

title: Iran's Biggest Bridge Collapses After Strikes, Trump Says 'More To Follow'
content: The bridge that was still under construction was supposed to link Iran's capital Tehran to the western city of Karaj. The bridge is 136 metres high and is presented as an engineering masterpiece of the Middle East.

title: Pak Gangster Among 2 Charged For Grenade Attack On Punjab YouTuber's House
content: The National Investigation Agency (NIA), which took over the case from the Punjab Police last December, has named Shehzad as an absconder in the supplementary chargesheet filed before a special court, an official statement said.

title: 'BJP Against Infiltrators, Not Indigenous Muslims': Amit Shah In Assam
content: The Home Minister was seeking support for ruling ally Asom Gana Parishad (AGP)'s Keshab Mahanta, who is also a senior minister in the state government.

title: Election Commission Hands Over Malda Case To Anti-Terror Agency NIA
content: The Election Commission of India on Thursday handed over the probe into the gherao of the seven judicial officers in West Bengal's Malda district to the NIA, following a Supreme Court directive.

title: Indian-American Lawyer Challenges Trump's Birthright Citizenship Order
content: Before joining Constitutional Accountability Centre (CAC), Smita Ghosh was a Research Fellow at Georgetown University Law Centre, where she taught classes on immigration law and separation of powers.

title: Sandeep Rai Rathore Appointed As Tamil Nadu Top Cop Ahead Of Polls
content: Sandeep Rai Rathore, a 1992 batch IPS officer, has been appointed as the new DGP and HoPF ahead of the April 23 Assembly election to the state. Previously, he was DGP Training, Chennai.

title: Mock Drills Held Across Delhi To Deal With Disasters, War-Like Situations
content: From shopping malls in North and Old Delhi and from hospitals to schools and District Management offices, the mock drills underscored the government's efforts to strengthen civil defence mechanisms.

title: "Illegal": Supreme Court Slams Rajasthan For Denotifying Chambal Sanctuary Land
content: The National Chambal Sanctuary, also called the National Chambal Gharial Wildlife Sanctuary, is a 5,400 sq km tri-state protected area.

title: Bhagwan Mann Inaugurates Hospital In Punjab Village, To Benefit 50,000 People
content: During his visit, Bhagwant Mann also interacted with patients and their families at the hospital, inquiring about their well-being and reviewing the facilities on the ground.

title: Russian Deputy PM Meets PM Modi, Discuss Trade, Economic Ties
content: The prime minister also extended warm greetings to Vladimir Putin and said he looked forward to their continued exchanges.

title: Shunned By Ministers, 'Jinxed' Delhi Bungalow To Be Disaster Management HQ
content: Top officials indicated the move is part of a broader push to put underutilised government properties to productive use, while strengthening Delhi's disaster preparedness infrastructure.

title: India Joins 60 Countries' Effort To Reopen Strait Of Hormuz
content: The Strait of Hormuz is critical to the world economy because 20% of global energy supplies pass through the narrow waterway.

title: "You Shouldn't Talk Every Day": Macron Slams Trump For Iran War U-Turns
content: During his state visit to South Korea on Thursday, Macron also said that Trump has undermined the North Atlantic Treaty Organisation (NATO) by creating "daily doubt" about America's commitment to the alliance.

title: Newly Married Hyderabad Techie Dies By Suicide Over Husband's Dowry Torture
content: Ishita Yadav, was found hanging from the ceiling fan in the hall of her apartment on Wednesday evening. Her husband, Neeraj Bhansal, alerted the police after finding her.

title: After AAP Demotion, Raghav Chadha Posts Video Of Issues Raised In Parliament
content: Raghav Chadha's response was a video posted on his X account. The video featured him without making any reference to his removal or to any tensions with the party leadership.

title: Why Such Great Hurry: Congress Vs BJP In Parliament Over Women's Quota Bill
content: The Congress had objected to what it called a "great hurry" to pass the bill, with party chief Mallikarjun Kharge saying the rush appeared to be politically motivated

title: Why Big Ten dominance might be here to stay
content: coach dusty May asked how recent rule changes in college athletics helped league teams have such success . this narrative ignores many past scandals in the league, let alone that the Big Ten has produced plenty of contenders through the years . the overall sentiment is somewhat fair, however, though .

title: Trump’s Iran address: Peace is close, war is closer
content: the speech, delivered from the white house on Wednesday night, marked Trump’s most comprehensive attempt to define the trajectory of a conflict that has escalated rapidly over the past month . but rather than offering clarity, it raised fresh questions about the risk of further escalation, and the durability of Washington’s alliances and partnerships .

title: Men's Final Four has a Carolina blue backdrop
content: it's been over a week since north Carolina fired coach Hubert Davis . there have been few updates on the north Carolina Tar Heels' coaching search . despite a dynamic men's final four in Indianapolis this weekend, UNC will be a primary topic of discussion .

title: Preview and predictions: Which teams will win in the semifinals?
content: a year ago, the Huskies, Gamecocks, Longhorns and Bruins were the top four teams . for just the second time, the final four is a repeat of the previous year . this is also the fifth time that all four no. 1 seeds made it through the bracket .

title: Women's March Madness: The 15 best players left in the field
content: the final women's college basketball player rankings for 2025-26 are pared down to 15 as the tournament shifts to Phoenix for the national semifinals . Sarah Strong has been no. 1 since the preseason rankings . she is trying to replicate what former Huskies great Breanna Stewart did: win four national championships in four seasons .

title: Konnor Griffin is headed to the majors! What you need to know about Pirates' 19-year-old
content: the Pittsburgh Pirates are calling up the top prospect in the sport . the 19-year-old shortstop is expected to become MLB's first teenage position player since Juan Soto debuted in 2018 . he is the best prospect baseball has seen in years .
